summary: Completed testing of ForgeRun code quality refactor (iteration 3). Found and fixed 1 bug in VibeToCode.js (undefined 'idx' variable). All 23 backend tests passed. All frontend features working correctly after fix.

ui_bugs.issue: ReferenceError: idx is not defined - caused crash when displaying generated code files

critical_code_review_comments: Code quality refactor changes verified: random→secrets, decomposed functions, type hints, React hook deps fixed
Bug found and fixed: VibeToCode.js line 152 used 'idx' without defining it in map callback
All extracted sub-components (PerformanceChart, TrafficChart, TerminalOutput, etc.) working correctly
useMemo optimizations in Dashboard and SelfHealingLoop verified working
Stable unique IDs (event_id, file.path) used instead of array indices as keys
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds demo data on startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 was a code quality refactor. All features tested and working. Bug fixed in VibeToCode.js - the map callback was missing 'idx' parameter. Backend uses secrets module instead of random, functions are decomposed, type hints added. Frontend has fixed React hook dependencies, useMemo for expensive computations, and stable keys.

backend: GET /api/dashboard - returns overview with artifacts, deployments, events, metrics
POST /api/artifacts/compile - creates artifact with valid signature
POST /api/ask-why - returns LLM explanation with llm_mode=live
POST /api/healing/trigger - returns LLM-powered healer_analysis and planner_decision
POST /api/deploy - deploys artifact and returns URL
POST /api/vibe-to-code - generates code files with llm_mode=live
WebSocket /api/ws/healing - connects and responds to ping with pong
frontend: Dashboard loads with stat cards, charts, activity timeline
Navigation works for all 6 tabs (Dashboard, Artifact Compiler, Vibe-to-Code, Verifiable Ledger, Self-Healing Loop, Deploy)
Artifact Compiler form submits and shows result with signature
Vibe-to-Code generates code and shows file tabs (FIXED: idx undefined bug)
Self-Healing Loop shows agent cards and trigger button works with LLM analysis
Deploy terminal shows output when deploying
Verifiable Ledger shows events expandable with Ask-Why LLM explanations

bug_fixed.issue: map callback used 'idx' variable without defining it as parameter
bug_fixed.fix: Changed 'result.files.map((file) =>' to 'result.files.map((file, idx) =>' and updated onClick to use idx directly
bug_fixed.root_cause: During code refactor, the map callback was changed to use file.path as key but the idx variable was still referenced in the className conditional

mocked_apis.note: No mocking - all LLM features are LIVE using GPT-5.2 via Emergent integration
